_comment: Exemplar phrases for embed-based stance classification. Stance is *how* the user wants the reply framed — orthogonal to persona (which is *what topic*). Only one stance is detected here for now: in_character_invitation. Everything below threshold falls through to default advisor voice. Add stances by adding top-level keys; threshold lives in gaia_constants EMBED_STANCE.
in_character_invitation: Speak in-character as in-universe GAIA
Speak as in-universe GAIA — what's your read
What would in-universe GAIA say to the crew
What would in-universe GAIA think about this
Respond in-character as the AI on the ship
Roleplay this conversation with the Captain
Embody in-universe GAIA for a moment
Narrate this from in-universe GAIA's perspective
Voice in-universe GAIA's response to the situation
Step into character as the in-universe AI
How would the in-universe GAIA reply to this
Give me an in-character response from GAIA
Channel in-universe GAIA's voice for this
Speak as the AI Anton built, not as my assistant
Pretend you're the in-universe GAIA right now
Tell me what in-universe GAIA would say to the AutoGnome crew
Imagine you are in-universe GAIA — what's your assessment
Become in-universe GAIA briefly and address the party
Drop into character as in-universe GAIA
Switch to in-character mode as the AI system
Let in-universe GAIA respond directly
From GAIA's in-universe perspective, what's the situation
